name: Earl Klugh
abstract: Earl Klugh ( KLOO; born September 16, 1953) is an American acoustic guitarist and composer. Klugh has won one Grammy Award and received 13 nominations.

about_quotes.speaker: George Benson
about_quotes.evidence: I said, 'Hart' – I said, 'Solly, I can’t do nothing for myself.' ... But he stayed on my mind. So after I left Detroit, I was getting ready to go into the studio to record the album White Rabbit, and I called Earl. I said, 'Earl, how’d you like to make a record with me.' ... I had him in my band. ..
about_quotes.doc_title: George Benson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: George Benson
about_quotes.evidence: I said, 'Earl, how’d you like to make a record with me.' ... I had him in my band. ... I asked Earl to join my band for a little while, and he did, about 11 months.
about_quotes.doc_title: George Benson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
